channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2265] Interop 1.8/2.1<->2.4 Test failure on test suite lustre-initialization-1, subtest lustre-initialization_1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7ab6fcbc-2485-11e2-be27-52540035b04c.

The sub-test lustre-initialization_1 failed with the following error:

Test system failed to start single suite, so abandoning all hope and giving up

From the autotest logs there are warnings for no "--index" specified.

15:19:03:CMD: client-29vm3 /usr/sbin/mkfs.lustre --mgs --mdt --fsname=lustre --mountfsoptions=errors=remount-ro,iopen_nopriv,user_xattr,acl --param sys.timeout=20 --device-size=2097152 --backfstype ldiskfs --reformat /dev/lvm-MDS/P1
15:19:03:client-29vm3: warning: /dev/lvm-MDS/P1: for Lustre 2.4 and later, the target index must be specified with --index

And the MDS consoles shows:

15:19:37:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:19:37:Lustre: ctl-lustre-MDT0000: No data found on store. Initialize space
15:19:37:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/u
15:19:37:LNet: 2864:0:(debug.c:324:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
15:19:37:LNet: 2865:0:(debug.c:324:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
15:19:37:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: e2label /dev/lvm-MDS/P1
15:19:49:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:19:49:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:20:00:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:20:00:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:20:01:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:20:12:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:20:12:LustreError: Skipped 1 previous similar message
15:20:34:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:20:34:LustreError: Skipped 3 previous similar messages
15:21:15:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:21:15:LustreError: Skipped 6 previous similar messages
15:22:17:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11

15:24:29:LustreError: Skipped 25 previous similar messages

15:37:25:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:37:25:LustreError: Skipped 102 previous similar messages
15:47:28:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:47:28:LustreError: Skipped 120 previous similar messages
15:57:31:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
15:57:31:LustreError: Skipped 120 previous similar messages
16:07:36:LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The mds_connect operation failed with -11

item.summary: Interop 1.8/2.1<->2.4 Test failure on test suite lustre-initialization-1, subtest lustre-initialization_1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This is a similar problem with LU-1526.

Jinshan,
Can you please have a look at this one?
Thank you!
The server build has already included fix from LU-1526
